title: Anti.DC
description: This is the perfect low end modpack for people who both want the vanilla vibe but still able to PvP
body:
## What is this modpack?
This modpack is for **VERY low end PCs**, and people who want to play **both survival and PvP**. It maintains the PvP Advantages (That i know of), and still has the vanilla feel that we all know and love.

## Why did I make this pack?
I made this pack because, as a low end minecraft player, i feel like it took too long to look for mods, so this pack can act like a base that you can put mods on.

## Why use this modpack?
Other modpacks like [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), and [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) optimize your minecraft by allocating computer resources to minecraft, meaning lower end pcs end up using too much resources and not leaving enough for other apps and possibly crashing your pc all together. This modpack optimizes the game while still keeping your device running with resources remaining, making it much better for low end PCs and Laptops.

## Features
### PvP
-Crosshair Indicator
-Totem Counter
-Armor Hud
-Hurt Cam
-Crystal Optimizer
-Status Bars
-Health Indicators
### Survival
-Clumps
-Mouse Tweaks
-Gamma Utils
-Minimap/Worldmap
-Continuity
### Other
-Shulkerbox tooltips
-Cherished Worlds
-Voice Chat
-Searchables
-XXL Packets
-Flashback
